steps.title: Identify the emphatic phrase
steps.content: The key signal is “no surer road,” which declares that Don Jerónimo's home is the single, most reliable path to getting a play produced.

steps.title: Match emphasis to purpose
steps.content:
The correct answer says the phrase “emphasizes the degree to which...support is consequential,” and that's exactly what “no surer road” does — it positions his patronage as the sole, most reliable route for playwrights seeking production.

A, B, and D each misidentify the function as showing reluctance, fabricating a reputation contrast, or confusing his critical feedback with judgment on theatrical quality.

That is the correct answer.
